title: cephalaria syriaca var. boissieri
intro: Cephalaria syriaca var. boissieri is a plant species commonly known as Syrian cephalaria, a variety of the Cephalaria syriaca plant, which is a flowering plant in the honeysuckle family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Cephalaria syriaca var. boissieri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
